tasks.label: Ensure Ollama Running
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; try { $client = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient]::new('127.0.0.1', 11434); $client.Close(); Write-Host 'Ollama already running on 127.0.0.1:11434.' } catch { Write-Host 'Ollama is not running. Starting ollama serve...'; Start-Process -FilePath 'ollama' -ArgumentList 'serve' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $client = [System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient]::new('127.0.0.1', 11434); $client.Close(); Write-Host 'Ollama started successfully.' } catch { throw 'Failed to start Ollama automatically. Run `ollama serve` manually, then retry.' } }
